title: November 17
content:
<noinclude>{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
{{Month|November|hide31=yes}}

'''November 17''' is the 321st day of the year (322nd in leap years), with 44 days remaining.</noinclude>

*[[1940s#1947|1947]] – [[James Warwick]] is born.
*[[1950s#1952|1952]] – [[Duwayne Dunham]] is born.
*[[1950s#1956|1956]] – [[Rebecca Moesta]] is born.
*[[1978]] – ''[[The Star Wars Holiday Special]]'' airs for the first and only time on [[CBS]].
*[[1984]] – [[Return of the Jedi Weekly 74|''Return of the Jedi Weekly'' 74]] published.
*[[2003]] – "[[Chapter 7 (Star Wars: Clone Wars)]]" airs on [[Cartoon Network]].
*[[2004]] – [[Star Wars: Clone Wars Adventures Volume 2|''Clone Wars Adventures: Volume 2'']] published.
*[[2006]] – ''[[The Last of the Jedi: Return of the Dark Side]]'' published.
*[[2009]] – ''[[Scavenger's Guide to Droids]]'' published.
*2009 – ''[[Star Wars: Trench Run]]'' released.
*[[2010]] – [[Star Wars: Dark Times Volume 4—Blue Harvest|''Star Wars: Dark Times: Blue Harvest'' trade paperback]] published.
*[[2012]] – "[[Bound for Rescue]]" airs on Cartoon Network.
*[[2014]] – "[[Empire Day (episode)|Empire Day]]" airs on [[Disney XD]].
*[[2015]] – ''[[Star Wars Battlefront]]'' released.
*[[2016]] – ''[[Star Wars: Uprising]]'' shut down.
*[[2017]] – ''[[Star Wars Battlefront II]]'' released.
*[[2019]] – "[[The Relic Raiders]]" airs on [[Disney Channel]].
*2019 – [[Life Day]] celebration held at [[Star Wars: Galaxy's Edge|Galaxy's Edge]] theme park.
*[[2020]] – ''[[The LEGO Star Wars Holiday Special]]'' premieres on [[Disney+]].
*2020 – ''[[Star Wars Rebels, Vol. 1]]'' published in English.
*[[2021]] – [[Doctor Aphra (2020) 16|''Doctor Aphra'' (2020) 16]] published.
*2021 – [[The High Republic Adventures — The Monster of Temple Peak 4|''The High Republic Adventures — The Monster of Temple Peak'' 4]] published.
*2021 – [[The High Republic Adventures (2021) 10|''The High Republic Adventures'' (2021) 10]] published.
*[[2023]] – "[[The Great Leaf Glide / The Harvest Feast]]" aired on [[Disney Junior]].
*2023 – [[Alex Fernandez]] dies.
*[[2026]] – ''[[The Mandalorian and Grogu (junior novelization)]]'' to be published.
